description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python that runs on workflow dispatch, push to main, and pull requests to main. Run two jobs, Ruff and Pyright, on ubuntu-24.04. The Ruff job checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs Ruff, and runs Ruff check and format. The Pyright job checks out the repository, sets up C++ and Python, installs Pyright and NumPy, builds Ice for Python, and runs Pyright check.
